note: No MCP server is installed by default. Each entry must be explicitly reviewed and approved before use. See docs/mcp-policy.md.

allowlistedServers.description: Read local files and directories. Write operations are blocked.
allowlistedServers.notes: Read-only filesystem access only. Used for inspecting project files.

allowlistedServers.description: Generate Cursor and Codex prompts from idea or task descriptions.
allowlistedServers.notes: Pure text generation. No side effects.

pendingReview.description: Read PR, issue, and CI status from configured repositories.
pendingReview.notes: Requires scoped GITHUB_TOKEN. Must be reviewed before enabling.

blocked.reason: Arbitrary shell access is permanently blocked in CopelandOS.
Screen, mouse, and keyboard control are permanently blocked.
Email sending is permanently blocked. Draft-only mode is enforced.
Package installation requires explicit human confirmation and PR review.
Deployment controls require explicit human confirmation.
